title: Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi
tagline: Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi, Kerala

overview.short: The Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes is a church in Chemperi, India.
overview.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes is a church in Chemperi, India. The church was established in 1948. It was raised to the status of a minor basilica by Pope Francis in April 2024. The official ceremony of elevating it to a basilica took place on 14 August 2024.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chemperi
topPlaces.description: Chemperi is a town on the bank of the Chemperi River, in the Western Ghat, in the Kannur district of South India. It is characterized by its production and export of rubber and spices, its beautiful hillocks, and its serene streams.

topPlaces.name: Eruvessi
topPlaces.description: Eruvessi is a village in Irikkur Block Panchayat, Taliparamba Taluk, Kannur district in Kerala, India, around 50 kilometers from Kannur. It was ruled by Mannanar dynasty of Muthedath Aramana and Elayadath Aramana.

topPlaces.name: Payyavoor
topPlaces.description: Payyavoor is a small town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is the headquarters of Payyavoor Grama Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Sreekandapuram
topPlaces.description: Sreekandapuram is a municipality in Kannur district of the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Nediyanga
topPlaces.description: Nediyanga village falls under Sreekandapuram Municipality in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Naduvil and Kudianmala
topPlaces.description: Naduvil is a small town in Kannur district in the Indian State of Kerala. The town is the headquarters of Naduvil Grama panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kunnathoor Padi
topPlaces.description: Kunnathoor Padi (also Kunnathur Padi) is a village in the Payyavoor Grama Panchayat of the Kannur district in Kerala, India. It serves as the historic center and abode (Aroodam) for the folk Hindu deity Sree Muthappan.

topPlaces.name: Paithalmala
topPlaces.description: Paithalmala is a hill station in the Kannur district of Kerala in India, located near Pottenplave. At a height of 4500 ft above from sea level, it is the highest geographic peak in Kannur.

items.note: Chemperi is a town on the bank of the Chemperi River, in the Western Ghat, in the Kannur district of South India. It is characterized by its production and export of rubber and spices, its beautiful hillocks, and its serene streams.

Eruvessi is a village in Irikkur Block Panchayat, Taliparamba Taluk, Kannur district in Kerala, India, around 50 kilometers from Kannur. It was ruled by Mannanar dynasty of Muthedath Aramana and Elayadath Aramana.
Payyavoor is a small town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is the headquarters of Payyavoor Grama Panchayat.
Sreekandapuram is a municipality in Kannur district of the Indian state of Kerala.
Nediyanga village falls under Sreekandapuram Municipality in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Naduvil is a small town in Kannur district in the Indian State of Kerala. The town is the headquarters of Naduvil Grama panchayat.

Kunnathoor Padi (also Kunnathur Padi) is a village in the Payyavoor Grama Panchayat of the Kannur district in Kerala, India. It serves as the historic center and abode (Aroodam) for the folk Hindu deity Sree Muthappan.
Paithalmala is a hill station in the Kannur district of Kerala in India, located near Pottenplave. At a height of 4500 ft above from sea level, it is the highest geographic peak in Kannur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (116 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, Chemperi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chemperi, Eruvessi, Payyavoor, Sreekandapuram, Nediyanga.
